query:
SELECT id, date, status FROM dailyPlans WHERE date='2099-12-31' OR date='2028-03-06';
SELECT id, planId, sortOrder, blockType, title FROM scheduleBlocks WHERE planId IN (SELECT id FROM dailyPlans WHERE date='2028-03-06') ORDER BY sortOrder;
command:

SELECT id, planId, sortOrder, blockType, title FROM scheduleBlocks WHERE planId IN (SELECT id FROM dailyPlans WHERE date='2028-03-06') ORDER BY sortOrder;
